text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Now, if you would kindly leave...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Ngh, I should have known it wouldn't be that
simple...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Well... I have a rather stubborn twinge around my
temple that's refusing to give me a moment's
peace.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Go... Go... Would you please leave me be?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Mejiro Bright's headaches are getting
to her.
